target: 2. Town Hall Request
But I was really surprised…
What?

I never thought Shinpei would know
that Kaori Koyuba.
You heard she was a classmate, right?

I mean, "that" Kaori?
She's not that famous.

She's famous.
She's super famous!

An idol group?
The center of it?
Didn't she do that?
Why the question mark?
I'm not that familiar with idols.

But even I, who's not into idols,
know about her.
She's definitely a big idol.
(That Kaori's a big idol…)
(I just don't get it.)
So, Kaori…
Y-yes!

What was your relationship
with Shinpei?

H-he's not someone I'm that close to.
I don't think I can answer that.
Is that so?
We just talked a little at the library… I think.

Yeah, that's right.
I was on the library committee,
so we just talked a little.
Shinpei was always into books.

Mio, don't you remember
Kaori at all?

Ahaha… not really.
Sorry.

It's okay.
We were different grades.

(To be honest, it's quite surprising.
She used to seem quiet and reserved,
and yet now she's an idol…?)
Ah, by the way… Kofune-san.
What is it?

I was wondering if you'd prefer me to call you
by my name…
Is that okay! Then… Kaori-chan!
Calling someone older with "-chan" is rude, isn't it?

It's fine, really.
It makes it easier for me to talk.
Ah, can I be called by my name too?
Yeah, then I'll call you Mio-chan.

Shin-chan, will you still call me
"Koyuba-san"?
Ah, just keep it as "Koyuba-san" like before.

U-uh, yeah…
Being called by my name by Ajiro-kun…
Kaori-chan, you're being annoying.

I-I didn't mean that!
Being called by my name by Ajiro-kun…
I-I'm embarrassed!
Then let's go back to "Koyuba-san."
U-uh, yeah…
Hey, sorry for making you wait.
Huh? Where's the town association guy?

I had to go back for festival preparations.
From here on, I'll explain things,
so come this way.
Y-yes, please take care of us!

You two are helping out too?
That's really helpful.
Um, why were we called here?
What, you didn't tell them anything?
Yes…

I'm sorry, both of you.
I didn't explain in detail, did I?

Actually, I came back to the island
for the summer festival.
The summer festival at Hitojinja Shrine?

That's right, we asked Mio
to be the one to liven up the summer festival.
I'll do my best!

Even though she's a popular star
and busy with her schedule,
she came all the way here.

Huh~.
Coming all the way for the festival…

She truly loves this island,
you know.
She even does hometown tax donations.

This is my hometown after all…
I've always wanted to come back
when I had the time!

Also, there was someone
I've wanted to see for a long time…

Someone you wanted to see?
A friend or something?

Eh? Oh, a friend…?
S-she might not even be a friend though…

I don't know why,
but it'd be great if they could reunite at the festival.
Ah, yes…
Well, now comes the real topic…

On the day of the festival,
Mio will do a talk show and a mini concert.

Yay!
I get to hear Kaori's songs!?

The mini concert shouldn't be a problem,
and with the live staff it'll be a great stage.
The problem is the talk show.

She was supposed to talk about
her memories here on Hitogashima
and promote the island's tourism——
Was there something wrong?

No, it's just…
She hasn't decided
what to talk about at all yet.

…That's right.
I spent a lot of time alone
when I was little…

So my memories of this island
are just about beautiful scenery,
and I don't have anything to talk about.
We think that's enough, you know.

No…
That's too weak for a talk show.

Well, I suppose you're right.
If she had a more impactful story,
we'd be thrilled.
So here's where you two come in!
What do you mean?
Show Mio around the island again.

Maybe you'll remember
some interesting stories you'd forgotten.

If you find something that promotes tourism,
that'd be great.
Is that something only we can do?

That's right. Since you're young,
you know what tourists today like.

I was away from this island
for two years or so…

It's fine.
After two years, the island
hasn't changed at all.

That's better, Shin.
You're an idol partner.

Idiot!
You're also being chosen as a partner!
Eh, really!?

Can you show Mio around
the spots that young people like?

Show her around?
I don't know how to do that.
I have to help at the store anyway…
Well, it's busy before the festival.
Is that okay with both of you?
Huh?
What?

In recent years,
how do you think the number of tourists
has been doing?

I don't know.
I've never really thought about it.

It's flat…
Actually, it's slightly decreasing.

Oh, you actually read the materials
I sent over!
That's great!
Because I love this island!

Repeat rate isn't bad.
The problem is attracting new tourists.

If this continues,
the island's tourism will dwindle,
and eventually die out!
We need to take action!

So that's why…
you're using a current idol?

Exactly!
This year's festival
will bring in a lot of tourists
because of Mio!

We're aiming for a miraculous event!
We need Mio's concert
to revive the island's tourism!

If they come here,
they'll understand
how great this island is!
The repeat rate proves that!
The key is making them know this island!

Yes! Then they'll definitely
want to come here!

We just need that chance!
Only you young people
can create that!
…Hah, hah.

That was a passionate speech.
What do you think, Shin?
After hearing that, I couldn't say no.

Kaori also seems
to be really enthusiastic.

Ah, hehe…
When I think about this island,
I get so excited.

Well, if you two are okay with it…
Hey, Mio?
Yeah, it seems kind of fun.
Oh! You two understood!

Then, please take care of it!
Mio, you're okay with it too, right?
Yes, I'll take care of it!

Sorry, Shinpei, Mio.
I dragged you into this…

Don't worry.
This must be fate.

That's right.
Let's tour the island together.

Yeah…!
Thank you, Shinpei.
